title: KubernetesEvent
description: Contract schema for a Kubernetes Pod state change event captured by the k8s-collector service.

podName.description: The name of the Kubernetes Pod that triggered the event.

namespace.description: The Kubernetes namespace in which the Pod resides.

status.description: The current phase of the Pod lifecycle, as defined by the Kubernetes Pod phase specification.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the event was observed by the collector.
